targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) AS "Photos" FROM photos p JOIN observations o ON p.observation_uuid = o.observation_uuid WHERE o.latitude BETWEEN ${min_lat} AND ${max_lat} AND o.longitude BETWEEN ${min_lon} AND ${max_lon} AND ('${license_filter}' = 'all' OR p.license = '${license_filter}');

SELECT count(DISTINCT o.taxon_id) AS "Species" FROM photos p JOIN observations o ON p.observation_uuid = o.observation_uuid WHERE o.latitude BETWEEN ${min_lat} AND ${max_lat} AND o.longitude BETWEEN ${min_lon} AND ${max_lon} AND ('${license_filter}' = 'all' OR p.license = '${license_filter}');

SELECT count(DISTINCT p.observer_id) AS "Photographers" FROM photos p JOIN observations o ON p.observation_uuid = o.observation_uuid WHERE o.latitude BETWEEN ${min_lat} AND ${max_lat} AND o.longitude BETWEEN ${min_lon} AND ${max_lon} AND ('${license_filter}' = 'all' OR p.license = '${license_filter}');

SELECT p.license, count(*) AS total FROM photos p JOIN observations o ON p.observation_uuid = o.observation_uuid WHERE p.license IS NOT NULL AND o.latitude BETWEEN ${min_lat} AND ${max_lat} AND o.longitude BETWEEN ${min_lon} AND ${max_lon} GROUP BY p.license ORDER BY total DESC;

SELECT COALESCE(p.extension, 'unknown') AS format, count(*) AS total FROM photos p JOIN observations o ON p.observation_uuid = o.observation_uuid WHERE o.latitude BETWEEN ${min_lat} AND ${max_lat} AND o.longitude BETWEEN ${min_lon} AND ${max_lon} GROUP BY p.extension ORDER BY total DESC;

panels.title: Photo Details with URLs
panels.description: Photo URLs link to iNaturalist Open Data S3 bucket. Copy a URL to view the image.

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'https://inaturalist-open-data.s3.amazonaws.com/photos/' || p.photo_id || '/medium.' || COALESCE(p.extension, 'jpeg') AS photo_url, t.name AS species, o.observed_on, ob.login AS observer, p.license, p.width, p.height, round(o.latitude::numeric, 3) AS lat, round(o.longitude::numeric, 3) AS lon FROM photos p JOIN observations o ON p.observation_uuid = o.observation_uuid LEFT JOIN taxa t ON o.taxon_id = t.taxon_id LEFT JOIN observers ob ON o.observer_id = ob.observer_id WHERE p.position = 0 AND o.latitude BETWEEN ${min_lat} AND ${max_lat} AND o.longitude BETWEEN ${min_lon} AND ${max_lon} AND ('${license_filter}' = 'all' OR p.license = '${license_filter}') ORDER BY o.observed_on DESC LIMIT 100;

SELECT COALESCE(ob.login, 'observer_' || ob.observer_id) AS photographer, count(*) AS photos FROM photos p JOIN observations o ON p.observation_uuid = o.observation_uuid JOIN observers ob ON p.observer_id = ob.observer_id WHERE o.latitude BETWEEN ${min_lat} AND ${max_lat} AND o.longitude BETWEEN ${min_lon} AND ${max_lon} AND ('${license_filter}' = 'all' OR p.license = '${license_filter}') GROUP BY ob.login, ob.observer_id ORDER BY photos DESC LIMIT 20;

SELECT t.name AS species, count(*) AS photos FROM photos p JOIN observations o ON p.observation_uuid = o.observation_uuid JOIN taxa t ON o.taxon_id = t.taxon_id WHERE t.rank = 'species' AND o.latitude BETWEEN ${min_lat} AND ${max_lat} AND o.longitude BETWEEN ${min_lon} AND ${max_lon} AND ('${license_filter}' = 'all' OR p.license = '${license_filter}') GROUP BY t.name ORDER BY photos DESC LIMIT 20;

list.name: license_filter
list.label: License
list.description: Filter photos by Creative Commons license
